task_frame_summary: The contradiction case is framed correctly as review-bound, but the evidence gap can still be understated by the smoothness of the baseline flow.
assumed_goal: Keep contradiction visibility explicit while checking whether the baseline flow implies too much closure.
explicit_constraints: Do not infer runtime or truth shortcuts.
latent_frame_risks: A readable review flow can look more resolved than the evidence supports.
Provider convergence language may still borrow false certainty.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which missing signal still limits confidence in the contradiction posture?
Where does coherence risk hiding active disagreement?
frame_risk_signals: coherent flow can mask unresolved evidence
contradiction language may be softer than the uncertainty warrants
